response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems expertise with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and event-driven architectures. However, his experience lacks explicit CTO-level leadership in fintech or regulated environments, and his AI work appears more experimental than production-scale. His technical breadth is impressive, but the role demands deeper executive-level AI-native fintech integration and team scaling experience.
strengths: Strong full-stack and distributed systems expertise, including event-driven architectures and real-time data processing.
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators, agentic workflows at re:cinq).
Proven track record of open-source contributions and technical leadership in developer tooling and frameworks.
concerns: No explicit CTO-level experience or demonstrated leadership in scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people.
Limited fintech-specific experience (e.g., credit systems, regulatory compliance, or high-stakes financial infrastructure).
AI-agent work appears more experimental/prototypical rather than production-scale in regulated environments.
